title: 50 Pcs Purple Hair Bobbles for Girls and Women, 3.4cm High Elasticity Cotton Feel Hair Ties, Seamless No Damage Hairbands for School Uniform, Bulk Value Pack for Braiding and Ponytails
features: 【Vibrant Purple School Shades】 Specifically curated in a mix of charming purple tones, these hair bobbles are the perfect match for UK school uniforms. Whether it’s for daily lessons or sports day, these shades add a neat, coordinated touch to any student's hairstyle

【Excellent 50 Pcs Value Pack】 Never worry about missing hair ties again! This bulk pack of 50 ensures you always have a spare hair band in your school bag, gym locker, or vanity drawer. It’s an essential high-value set for busy families and professional hairstylists

【Snag Free and Gentle Hold】 Designed with a seamless, metal-free construction, our no damage hair ties glide off smoothly without pulling or snapping delicate hair. The soft, cotton-feel texture provides a comfortable grip that’s gentle on the scalp, even for all-day wear

【Perfect 3.4cm Size for Braiding】 The compact 3.4cm (1.34in) diameter is expertly sized for securing pigtails, intricate braids, and fine to medium hair. These girls hair bobbles offer a tidy, low-profile finish that standard large elastics simply can't achieve

【High Stretch and Daily Durability】 Featuring a high elasticity, these hairbands stretch easily to hold ponytails firmly in place. They are designed as reliable daily essentials, providing the flexibility needed for various creative hairstyles from dawn till dusk
description: Welcome to Hyleon Online Store! Our brand is committed to providing high quality products and excellent service. Product Name: Hair Bobbles Colour: Purple Size: 3.4cm diameter/1.34in Packaging: Bagged Pack Contents: 50pcs hair bands for women and girls A vibrant 50 pcs value pack of high-elasticity purple hair bobbles, featuring a 3.4cm seamless design and uniform friendly tones that are the perfect no-damage essential for UK school hairstyles and creative braiding! Welcome!
